reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the work named among Evelyn Waugh's famous works.
2. Determine when that work was first published and return the year.
original_final_question: When was Evelyn Waugh famous work first published? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which Evelyn Waugh novel is named among his most famous works? Evidence: Evelyn Waugh: His most famous works include the early satires "Decline and Fall" (1928) and "A Handful of Dust" (1934), the novel "Brideshead Revisited" (1945) and the Second World War trilogy "Sword of Honour" (1952-61). -> Brideshead Revisited

Node 2: When was Brideshead Revisited first published? Evidence: Brideshead Revisited: Brideshead Revisited, The Sacred & Profane Memories of Captain Charles Ryder is a novel by English writer Evelyn Waugh, first published in 1945. -> 1945
